sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16782" key="a)su/mfqartos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσύμ-φθαρτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n16782.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without blending,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κρᾶσις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0530.tlg006:10:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Gaur.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.6</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
